description: A corporate client has signed a contract for a block of rooms and has sent the list of guest names to be assigned to those rooms.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the group block reservation in the PMS.

expected_outcome.value: The agent finds the master group block.

nodes.task_description: Enter the names from the client's list into the individual reservations within the block.

expected_outcome.value: All guest names are accurately entered against the reserved rooms.

nodes.task_description: Send a confirmation of the completed rooming list back to the client.

expected_outcome.value: The client receives a confirmation that all their guests are registered.
